creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Most of the functional changes in Adaptec's driver are now in the 
FreeBSD tree.  We can't just merge the upstream driver wholesale as 
it still has regressions relative to ours (e.g., kernel core dumping 
on amd64). 

I'll keep the other aac(4) update CQ (kern/103615) open as a reminder 
to continue examing the differences between Adaptec's driver and the 
one in our tree and continue to bring in the important functional 
improvements. 

Thanks, 
Ed
